param.value: CustomerCase(title=Create customer with only required Company, data=CustomerDataDriven(company=Create customer with only required Company, vatNumber=null, phoneNumber=null, website=null, group=null, currencySymbol=null, language=null, address=null, city=null, state=null, zipCode=null, country=null), expectedType=success, expectedMessage=null)

CustomerCase(title=Create customer with all fields, data=CustomerDataDriven(company=All fields, vatNumber=123456789, phoneNumber=0123456789, website=https://nashtech.com.vn, group=VIP, currencySymbol=€, language=Vietnamese, address=123 Street, Hanoi, city=Hanoi, state=Hoan Kiem, zipCode=100000, country=Vietnam), expectedType=success, expectedMessage=null)

CustomerCase(title=Create customer - with VAT only, data=CustomerDataDriven(company=1 - VAT, vatNumber=123456789, phoneNumber=null, website=null, group=null, currencySymbol=null, language=null, address=null, city=null, state=null, zipCode=null, country=null), expectedType=success, expectedMessage=null)

CustomerCase(title=Create customer - with Phone only, data=CustomerDataDriven(company=2 - Phone, vatNumber=null, phoneNumber=0123456789, website=null, group=null, currencySymbol=null, language=null, address=null, city=null, state=null, zipCode=null, country=null), expectedType=success, expectedMessage=null)

CustomerCase(title=Create customer with Website only, data=CustomerDataDriven(company=3 - Website, vatNumber=null, phoneNumber=null, website=https://example.com, group=null, currencySymbol=null, language=null, address=null, city=null, state=null, zipCode=null, country=null), expectedType=success, expectedMessage=null)

CustomerCase(title=Create customer with Group only, data=CustomerDataDriven(company=4 - Group, vatNumber=null, phoneNumber=null, website=null, group=VIP, currencySymbol=null, language=null, address=null, city=null, state=null, zipCode=null, country=null), expectedType=success, expectedMessage=null)

CustomerCase(title=Create customer with Currency only, data=CustomerDataDriven(company=5 - Currency, vatNumber=null, phoneNumber=null, website=null, group=null, currencySymbol=$, language=null, address=null, city=null, state=null, zipCode=null, country=null), expectedType=success, expectedMessage=null)

CustomerCase(title=Create customer with Language only, data=CustomerDataDriven(company=6 - Language, vatNumber=null, phoneNumber=null, website=null, group=null, currencySymbol=null, language=English, address=null, city=null, state=null, zipCode=null, country=null), expectedType=success, expectedMessage=null)

CustomerCase(title=Create customer with Address info, data=CustomerDataDriven(company=7 - Address, vatNumber=null, phoneNumber=null, website=null, group=null, currencySymbol=null, language=null, address=123 Street, city=Hanoi, state=Hoan Kiem, zipCode=100000, country=Vietnam), expectedType=success, expectedMessage=null)

CustomerCase(title=Create customer with Address + Contact info, data=CustomerDataDriven(company=8 - Address + Contact, vatNumber=null, phoneNumber=0987654321, website=null, group=null, currencySymbol=null, language=null, address=456 Nguyen Trai, city=Hanoi, state=Hoan Kiem, zipCode=100000, country=Vietnam), expectedType=success, expectedMessage=null)

CustomerCase(title=Create customer with Address only, data=CustomerDataDriven(company=9 - Address, vatNumber=null, phoneNumber=null, website=null, group=null, currencySymbol=null, language=null, address=123 Street, city=null, state=null, zipCode=null, country=null), expectedType=success, expectedMessage=null)

CustomerCase(title=Create customer with City only, data=CustomerDataDriven(company=10 - City, vatNumber=null, phoneNumber=null, website=null, group=null, currencySymbol=null, language=null, address=null, city=Hanoi, state=null, zipCode=null, country=null), expectedType=success, expectedMessage=null)

CustomerCase(title=Create customer with State only, data=CustomerDataDriven(company=11 - State, vatNumber=null, phoneNumber=null, website=null, group=null, currencySymbol=null, language=null, address=null, city=null, state=Hoan Kiem, zipCode=null, country=null), expectedType=success, expectedMessage=null)

CustomerCase(title=Create customer with Zip only, data=CustomerDataDriven(company=12 - Zip, vatNumber=null, phoneNumber=null, website=null, group=null, currencySymbol=null, language=null, address=null, city=null, state=null, zipCode=100000, country=null), expectedType=success, expectedMessage=null)

CustomerCase(title=Create customer with Country only, data=CustomerDataDriven(company=13 - Country, vatNumber=null, phoneNumber=null, website=null, group=null, currencySymbol=null, language=null, address=null, city=null, state=null, zipCode=null, country=Vietnam), expectedType=success, expectedMessage=null)

CustomerCase(title=Create customer without Company, data=CustomerDataDriven(company=null, vatNumber=null, phoneNumber=0123456789, website=null, group=null, currencySymbol=null, language=null, address=null, city=null, state=null, zipCode=null, country=null), expectedType=error, expectedMessage=This field is required.)
